global.description: The ad features a clean layout with abstract shapes and prominent text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting confidence in savings with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A collection of abstract shapes including a large oval and a square, rendered in a soft green color.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: Additional overlay shapes in a lighter shade of green, creating a layered effect.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle shape, visually simple and minimalistic.

elements.label: Medium circle
elements.description: A medium-sized circle shape, complementing the other abstract elements.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Save with confidence No hidden fees' prominently displayed at the center.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence No hidden fees

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: The logo 'VaultRun' in a clear, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Install now' in white, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, bright yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label reading 'UGC' in white text, located at the top left corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with soft colors, main offer text, logo, and CTA.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main offer text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: VaultRun, SALE, UGC, Save with confidence, No hidden fees, Install now
